from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_e26a3af2(I):
    x1 = rot90(I)
    x2 = apply(mostcommon, I)
    x3 = apply(mostcommon, x1)
    x4 = repeat(x2, ONE)
    x5 = repeat(x3, ONE)
    x6 = compose(size, dedupe)
    x7 = x6(x2)
    x8 = x6(x3)
    x9 = greater(x8, x7)
    x10 = branch(x9, height, width)
    x11 = x10(I)
    x12 = rot90(x4)
    x13 = branch(x9, x5, x12)
    x14 = branch(x9, vupscale, hupscale)
    O = x14(x13, x11)
    return O
